title: rubus ranftii
intro: Rubus ranftii, also known as the Alpine Raspberry or Red Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus ranftii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus ranftii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, and can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its benefits.
